---
title: 'Dear Connor & Preston,'
date: '2200-08-13T22:34:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1196174013287787642'
blogger_filename: '/2017/08/dear-flavia.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'WARNING'
---

This is my personal journal. You are welcome to read, but a word of warning:<br />
<br />
I've heard that if I never say anything out loud, and don't write it down, it'll fester instead of heal. At the same time, some of my thoughts would be hurtful for you to read, maybe even seriously painful. I have to get these thoughts out so they can go somewhere, and sometimes I'll say something one day I don't mean the next. So...<br />
<br />
Please keep that in mind before you read on.<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
